title: Skip Rust crate publish when version already exists
description: Release workflow should not fail if the Rust crate version is already published. Add a version existence check against crates.io and skip cargo publish when already present. Ensure Release workflow succeeds.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Starting: Release failed because rust crate version already exists on crates.io. Will add a check in .github/workflows/release.yml to skip publish when version is already published.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added release workflow check to query crates.io for taskulus version and skip cargo publish when version already exists.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Checked Release run 22013247194: rust-crate publish failed because taskulus 0.4.0 already exists on crates.io. Watching CI run 22018019359 for workflow fix; will verify Release after CI completes.
